# Andi Muchlas Ramadani - Software Engineer Portfolio

A retro terminal-themed portfolio showcasing expertise in backend development and real-time simulations.

## Technical Skills
- Backend: Go (Golang), gRPC, Redis, PostgreSQL
- Spatial: OSRM, PostGIS, Routing Algorithms
- Visualization: Unity (C#), Simulation systems
- UI/UX: Terminal User Interfaces (TUI), Retro CRT aesthetics

## Experience Summary
Software engineer with 2 years of experience in backend microservices and Unity simulations. Focuses on performance, spatial computation, and event-driven architectures.

## Links
- Website: https://andi-portfolio-nine.vercel.app/
